requirement_topic.en: EMC for motors, drives, and controls
requirement_topic.zh: 电机、驱动器与控制器 EMC
requirement_topic.zht: 電機、驅動器與控制器 EMC

summary.en: UAE conformity files for industrial motors should address EMC where the motor is supplied with a drive, controller, inverter, sensor, or electronic assembly. UAE practice uses GSO/UAE standards based on IEC/EN EMC methods, and the ECAS file may require evidence of emissions and immunity compliance.
summary.zh: 工业电机如随附驱动器、控制器、逆变器、传感器或电子组件，阿联酋合规文件应处理 EMC。阿联酋实践采用基于 IEC/EN EMC 方法的 GSO/UAE 标准，ECAS 文件可能要求提供发射和抗扰度合规证据。
summary.zht: 工業電機如隨附驅動器、控制器、逆變器、感測器或電子組件，阿聯酋合規文件應處理 EMC。阿聯酋實踐採用基於 IEC/EN EMC 方法的 GSO/UAE 標準，ECAS 文件可能要求提供發射和抗擾度合規證據。

summary.en: China domestic files may include GB EMC standards for drives or electronic controls and CCC evidence where products fall in CCC scope. A bare motor file may focus on GB 18613, GB 12665, and CCC baseline documents rather than a UAE-style EMC package.
summary.zh: 中国国内文件可能包括适用于驱动器或电子控制器的 GB EMC 标准，以及产品落入 CCC 范围时的 CCC 证据。纯电机文件可能更侧重 GB 18613、GB 12665 和 CCC 基线文件，而非阿联酋式 EMC 套件。
summary.zht: 中國國內文件可能包括適用於驅動器或電子控制器的 GB EMC 標準，以及產品落入 CCC 範圍時的 CCC 證據。純電機文件可能更側重 GB 18613、GB 12665 和 CCC 基線文件，而非阿聯酋式 EMC 套件。

standards_or_laws: GB EMC standards for drives or controls where applicable
CCC for <1 kV motors in CCC scope

gap.en: A China domestic motor file may omit EMC evidence needed for UAE ECAS when electronics are integrated. The UAE submission should distinguish a passive motor from a motor-drive package and include EMC test reports for the actual configuration shipped.
gap.zh: 当集成电子部件时，中国国内电机文件可能缺少阿联酋 ECAS 所需 EMC 证据。阿联酋申请应区分无源电机和电机驱动套件，并为实际出货配置提供 EMC 测试报告。
gap.zht: 當集成電子部件時，中國國內電機文件可能缺少阿聯酋 ECAS 所需 EMC 證據。阿聯酋申請應區分無源電機和電機驅動套件，並為實際出貨配置提供 EMC 測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where EMC standards are part of the ECAS route or where electronic assemblies are supplied
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where China EMC or CCC scope applies to the supplied configuration

source.publisher: UAE Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For motor-drive packages, include UAE/GSO/IEC EMC evidence for the shipped assembly; a China motor-only file is usually incomplete.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对电机驱动套件，应为实际出货组件提供 UAE/GSO/IEC EMC 证据；仅有中国纯电机文件通常不完整。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對電機驅動套件，應為實際出貨組件提供 UAE/GSO/IEC EMC 證據；僅有中國純電機文件通常不完整。

requirement_topic.en: TRA approval for wireless or radio-enabled motor products
requirement_topic.zh: 带无线或射频功能电机产品的 TRA 批准
requirement_topic.zht: 帶無線或射頻功能電機產品的 TRA 批准

summary.en: If the motor package includes a wireless module, telemetry unit, remote-control receiver, cellular modem, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or other radio equipment, UAE telecommunications type approval may be required through the Telecommunications Regulatory Authority route before import or sale.
summary.zh: 如电机套件包括无线模块、遥测单元、遥控接收器、蜂窝调制解调器、Wi-Fi、Bluetooth 或其他无线电设备，进口或销售前可能须通过阿联酋 Telecommunications Regulatory Authority 路径取得电信型号批准。
summary.zht: 如電機套件包括無線模組、遙測單元、遙控接收器、蜂窩數據機、Wi-Fi、Bluetooth 或其他無線電設備，進口或銷售前可能須通過阿聯酋 Telecommunications Regulatory Authority 路徑取得電信型號批准。

standards_or_laws: UAE TRA telecommunications equipment type approval

summary.en: China may require SRRC radio approval, network access approval, or CCC-related evidence for certain radio-enabled controls. Those approvals are domestic China approvals and do not replace UAE TRA type approval.
summary.zh: 中国可能要求特定带无线功能控制器取得 SRRC 无线电批准、入网许可或 CCC 相关证据。这些批准属于中国国内批准，不能替代阿联酋 TRA 型号批准。
summary.zht: 中國可能要求特定帶無線功能控制器取得 SRRC 無線電批准、入網許可或 CCC 相關證據。這些批准屬於中國國內批准，不能替代阿聯酋 TRA 型號批准。

standards_or_laws: SRRC where radio modules are in China scope
CCC for <1 kV motors in CCC scope

gap.en: A motor with remote monitoring can become a telecommunications product for UAE purposes. The UAE file should list every radio module and frequency band and should separate TRA approval from ESMA ECAS motor conformity.
gap.zh: 带远程监测功能的电机在阿联酋可能成为电信产品。阿联酋文件应列明所有无线模块和频段，并将 TRA 批准与 ESMA ECAS 电机合格评定分开处理。
gap.zht: 帶遠程監測功能的電機在阿聯酋可能成為電信產品。阿聯酋文件應列明所有無線模組和頻段，並將 TRA 批准與 ESMA ECAS 電機合格評定分開處理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where radio or telecommunications equipment is integrated
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where China radio or telecom approvals apply to the integrated module

source.publisher: UAE Telecommunications and Digital Government Regulatory Authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Wireless motor packages need a separate UAE TRA/TDRA check; China radio approvals and CCC do not substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 带无线功能的电机套件需要单独进行阿联酋 TRA/TDRA 核查；中国无线电批准和 CCC 不能替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 帶無線功能的電機套件需要單獨進行阿聯酋 TRA/TDRA 核查；中國無線電批准和 CCC 不能替代。
